message:
Command `# Monitor synthesis progress — poll every 90 seconds for up to 3 hours
WRAPPER_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper"
LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/wrapper_run.log"

for i in $(seq 1 120); do
  sleep 90
  STEP=$(ls -td "$WRAPPER_DIR/runs/wrapper_run/"[0-9]* 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  LAST_LINES=$(tail -3 "$LOG" 2>/dev/null)
  YOSYS_PID=$(pgrep -f "yosys.*synthesize.py" 2>/dev/null)
  OR_PID=$(pgrep -f "openroad" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  LR_PID=$(pgrep -f "librelane-wrapped" 2>/dev/null)

  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] Poll $i | LibreLane PID: ${LR_PID:-none} | Yosys: ${YOSYS_PID:-done} | OpenROAD: ${OR_PID:-none}"
  echo "  Current step dir: $STEP"
  echo "  Last log lines: $LAST_LINES"
  echo ""

  # If librelane is done, break
  if [ -z "$LR_PID" ]; then
    echo "LibreLane process exited. Checking results..."
    break
  fi
done` executed with exit code -1.

message.content: Synthesis is actively running (Yosys at 99% CPU). Monitoring progress.

done", "timeout": 10800}
function.name: execute_bash

content:
Command: "# Monitor synthesis progress — poll every 90 seconds for up to 3 hours
WRAPPER_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper"
LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/wrapper_run.log"

for i in $(seq 1 120); do
  sleep 90
  STEP=$(ls -td "$WRAPPER_DIR/runs/wrapper_run/"[0-9]* 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  LAST_LINES=$(tail -3 "$LOG" 2>/dev/null)
  YOSYS_PID=$(pgrep -f "yosys.*synthesize.py" 2>/dev/null)
  OR_PID=$(pgrep -f "openroad" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  LR_PID=$(pgrep -f "librelane-wrapped" 2>/dev/null)

  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] Poll $i | LibreLane PID: ${LR_PID:-none} | Yosys: ${YOSYS_PID:-done} | OpenROAD: ${OR_PID:-none}"
  echo "  Current step dir: $STEP"
  echo "  Last log lines: $LAST_LINES"
  echo ""

  # If librelane is done, break
  if [ -z "$LR_PID" ]; then
    echo "LibreLane process exited. Checking results..."
    break
  fi
done" timed out
